metadata.summary: pytest-isolate-mpi allows for MPI-parallel tests being executed in a segfault and MPI_Abort safe manner

documentation:
# MPI-Parallel, Crash-Safe Tests for Pytest

`pytest-isolate-mpi` is a plugin for [Pytest] to enable the test of
MPI-parallel Python software. MPI-parallel tests are executed in forked
MPI jobs with the help of [mpirun] to isolate the tests from each
other. Thus, a crash in test only aborts the test, not the whole test
suite. Similarly, deadlocks can be treated with timeouts for tests to
prevent a test suite from never being able to finish:

```
import pytest


@pytest.mark.mpi(ranks=2, timeout=10, unit="s")
def test_with_mpi(mpi_ranks):
    assert True  # replace with actual, MPI-parallel test code
```

## Installation

`pytest-isolate-mpi` is available on [pypi.org] and can be installed
with `pip`:

```
pip install pytest-mpi-isolate
```

## Documentation

For the full documentation, please see
<https://pytest-isolate-mpi.readthedocs.io/>.

## Contributing

Please refer to the [Contributor Guide] for
instructions on how to contribute to `pytest-isolate-mpi`.

## License

This work is licensed under the conditions of the BSD license, see
[LICENSE](LICENSE).

The software is provided as is. We sincerely welcome your feedback on
issues, bugs and possible improvements. Please use the issue tracker of
the project for the corresponding communication or make a fork. Our
priority and time line for working on the issues depend on the project
and its follow ups. This may lead to issue and tickets, which are not
pursued. In case you need an urgent fix, please contact us directly for
discussing possible forms of collaboration (direct contribution,
projects, contracting, ...): [Institute of Software Methods for Product
Virtualization](https://www.dlr.de/sp).

[contributor guide]: https://pytest-isolate-mpi.readthedocs.io/en/latest/contributing.html
[mpirun]: https://docs.open-mpi.org/en/v5.0.x/man-openmpi/man1/mpirun.1.html
[pypi.org]: https://pypi.org/project/pytest-isolate-mpi/
[pytest]: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/

modules.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._helpers
documentation: Internal helpers for testing only, do not use in main code

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._helpers._fix_plural
documentation: Work around error -> errors change in pytest 6

classes.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._helpers.ExpensiveComputation
documentation: Mock for an expensive to compute state.

classes.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._constants.MPIMarkerEnum
documentation:
Enum containing all the markers used by pytest-mpi

FIXME: Once we are on Python 3.11, use StrEnum

modules.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._fixturecache
documentation: Functionalities for caching fixture results across MPI-sessions.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._fixturecache._load_fixture_result
documentation: Loads fixture result from cache file, if it exists.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._fixturecache._cache_fixture_result
documentation: Saves fixture result to cache file, if it does not exists.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._fixturecache._get_cache_file_path
documentation: Returns a cache file path for a fixture call with size/rank combination.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._fixturecache._get_identifier
documentation: Return a unique but minimal identifier string for a fixture call.

modules.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin
documentation: Support for testing python code with MPI and pytest

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.pytest_configure
documentation: Add pytest-mpi to pytest (see pytest docs for more info)

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.pytest_addoption
documentation: Add pytest-mpi options to pytest cli and ini file

classes.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIConfiguration

methods.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIConfiguration.extend_command_for_parallel_execution
documentation: Extend a given command sequence by the mpirun call for the given number of ranks.
Configuration defining how to execute an MPI-parallel subprocess

classes.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIPlugin

methods.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIPlugin.pytest_configure
documentation: Hook setting config object (always called at least once)

methods.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIPlugin.pytest_generate_tests
documentation: Extend the marker @pytest.mark.mpi such that we have parametrization of the tests w.r.t. # ranks.

methods.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIPlugin.pytest_runtest_setup
documentation: Hook for doing additional MPI-related checks on mpi marked tests

methods.name: pytest_isolate_mpi._plugin.MPIPlugin.pytest_terminal_summary
documentation: Hook for printing MPI info at the end of the run
pytest plugin to assist with testing MPI-using code

modules.name: pytest_isolate_mpi.fixtures
documentation: MPI-specific fixtures.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi.fixtures.comm_fixture
documentation: Provides the MPI communicator available to the test.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi.fixtures.mpi_tmpdir_fixture
documentation:
Wraps Pytest builtin `tmpdir` fixture so that it can be used under
MPI from all MPI processes.

This fixture ensures that only one process handles the creation of temporary
folders broadcasts its path to the other processes.

functions.name: pytest_isolate_mpi.fixtures.mpi_tmp_path_fixture
documentation:
Wraps Pytest builtin `tmp_path` fixture so that it can be used under
MPI from all MPI processes.

This fixture ensures that only one process handles the creation of temporary
folders broadcasts its path to the other processes.
